title: nasturtium clavatum
intro: Nasturtium clavatum is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, commonly known as a cress or nasturtium. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally for its medicinal properties.
